code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  mut product = 1
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i < n
    mut b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut start = i
      while i < n and (match string.byte_at(line, i) when Some(v) v when None 0 end) != 32 and (match string.byte_at(line, i) when Some(v) v when None 0 end) != 9
        i = i + 1
      end
      let token = string.substring(line, start, i)
      let num = match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      product = product * num
    end
  end

  println("product=#{product}")
end
